{{Quote|My fall from grace was carefully orchestrated. Only a fool would want to be captain of Lord Vader's flagship: The mortality rate is phenomenal.|Alima to [[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]]|<ref name="Hammerhead" />}}
'''Alima''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Alima was born on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He rose through the ranks of the Navy to reach [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Conquest (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Conquest'']].

He was given the task of [[Subjugation of Ithor|subjugating]] [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] and leveled much of Ithor's [[Cathor Hills]]. For his actions he was given the opportunity of becoming captain of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. Realizing the threat this posed to his life, Alima purposefully got himself demoted to prevent himself from becoming captain.

Afterwards he was placed in charge of locating [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and discovered [[Momaw Nadon/Legends|Momaw Nadon]], his old [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] nemesis, in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], and demanded that the Ithorian find the droids, or the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] would wipe out his gardens.

After the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] escaped from Tatooine, Nadon told the [[Imperial Prefect]] that Alima had ignored Nadon's information regarding the ''Millennium Falcon''. Alima was executed by the Prefect instantly. Nadon, regretting his actions, stole genetic samples of Alima's DNA and cloned the former captain. In keeping with the [[Law of Life]], Nadon made two clones of Alima, in punishment for Alima's actions, and as a reminder of Nadon's.
